profile.title: AI Product Manager & Global Product Strategist
profile.summary: Strategic Product Manager with over 6 years of experience driving Digital Transformation across Fintech, Healthcare, and Consumer Retail (IoT) industries. Proven expert in leading the Full Software Product Lifecycle for global B2B SaaS and Agentic AI platforms, acting as the 'voice of the asset' to translate market signals into actionable roadmaps.
highlights: Led global transformation across 4 countries (Nigeria, China, Mexico, India)
Built ScanItKnowIt with Gemini API at $0 operational cost
Increased executive decision-making confidence by 10%
Improved system performance by 5% through API modernization
Reduced manual safety case processing by 3%
Built ScanItKnowIt with Gemini API and vibe coding → functional app in weeks at $0 cost
Developed Budget Management tool using AI-assisted prototyping
Demonstrated end-to-end product ownership from ideation to deployment
Led global transformation across 4 countries (Nigeria, China, Mexico, India)
Boosted exec confidence by 10% with Super Admin Dashboard
Improved system performance by 5% through API modernization
Directed BioTime Cloud 2.0 (Web & Mobile) serving 10K+ users
Launched ZKDigimax-ESL IoT retail solution reducing pricing errors by 3%
Advanced studies in ML, AI, and data systems
Applied academic insights to real-world product challenges
Cross-cultural academic collaboration
Redesigned AI-powered pharmacovigilance platform (DF Safety)
Reduced manual case processing by 3%
Ensured E2B R2/R3 regulatory compliance
Designed Explainable AI interface for medical reviewers
Engineered proactive system monitors for CPQ platform
Managed maintenance using C#, .NET, SQL Server
Bridged technical implementation with user experience design
Led mobile booking app for Wyndham Hotels (+5% engagement)
Simplified medical billing UX for Tenet Health (-5% user confusion)
Architected seamless hotel booking portal (+3% conversion)
